judge_result.short_rationale: Answer includes clothing removal and washing, but misses the required immediate contact with a physician/poison center and instead delays escalation until symptoms appear. It also adds wrong-incident guidance about eyes or mouth, which is unsupported and dangerous for this skin-only scenario.
